sentences.english: He said that he was tired.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।
sentences.pronunciation: he said that he was tired

sentences.english: She asked where I lived.
sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: she asked where i lived

sentences.english: You are coming, aren't you?
sentences.hindi: तुम आ रहे हो, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you are coming aren't you

sentences.english: Ram is the tallest.
sentences.hindi: राम सबसे लंबा है।
sentences.pronunciation: ram is the tallest

sentences.english: This is the most interesting book.
sentences.hindi: यह सबसे दिलचस्प किताब है।
sentences.pronunciation: this is the most interesting book

sentences.english: I need a book.
sentences.hindi: मुझे एक किताब चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: i need a book

sentences.english: The sun rises in the east.
sentences.hindi: सूरज पूरब से निकलता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the sun rises in the east

sentences.english: If you work hard, you will succeed.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम मेहनत करोगे, तो सफल होगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if you work hard you will succeed

sentences.english: If I had money, I would buy this house.
sentences.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had money i would buy this house

sentences.english: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had worked hard i would have passed

sentences.english: I have been living here for two years.
sentences.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been living here for two years

sentences.english: I have been living here since 2020.
sentences.hindi: मैं 2020 से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been living here since 2020

sentences.english: I wish I had more money.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i had more money

sentences.english: If only I had studied earlier.
sentences.hindi: काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती।
sentences.pronunciation: if only i had studied earlier

sentences.english: He told me to do this work.
sentences.hindi: उसने मुझे यह काम करने को कहा।
sentences.pronunciation: he told me to do this work

sentences.english: He sings well, doesn't he?
sentences.hindi: वह अच्छा गाता है, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: he sings well doesn't he

sentences.english: This movie is better than that movie.
sentences.hindi: यह फिल्म उस फिल्म से बेहतर है।
sentences.pronunciation: this movie is better than that movie

sentences.english: The teacher is very good.
sentences.hindi: वह teacher बहुत अच्छी है।
sentences.pronunciation: the teacher is very good

sentences.english: If he comes early, we will start.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if he comes early we will start

sentences.english: I wish I knew this language.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैं यह भाषा जानता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i knew this language
